content.body: Hi all, just a friendly reminder to post any discussion topics for this Thursday's joint CSSWG/WHATWG/OpenUI task force meeting to the meeting agenda issue: https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12412
Btw, Thursday is a holiday in many countries in Europe and WHATNOT will be in EMEA + APAC friendly time, so number of participants can be a bit low.
